status: ROUND 5 in progress (2026-06-10). Done: sla-monitoring, my-work, activity, audit-logs. Current: approvals(list) — FINAL round-5 item (codex inspection running). Rounds 1-4 complete. NOTE: cursor-agent quota resets 6/27; codex CLI substituted. PROCESS RULE since 43ef442a incident: every commit verified via direct pnpm --filter intake-frontend build.
meta_observation: Recurring architectural debt across forum/engagement/working_group/person/elected_official: overview cards read generic relationship/calendar/work-item data instead of dedicated entity tables; the rich section components live in dead, unrouted *DossierDetail wrappers; several fixes need edge-fn/RPC deploys. Safe auto-fix surface per workflow = mostly i18n + small data-contract/label fixes. Topic + organization were the cleanest. ALWAYS verify CRITICAL DB/RPC findings vs live SQL before acting (WG #1 was a false positive: stale migration file vs already-patched deployed RPC).

round4_done.incident: 43ef442a landed with a BROKEN build (invalid JSX comment placement; esbuild parse error). Discovered: pre-commit hook RUNS the build but does NOT block the commit on failure, and `timeout`/`npx` are broken on this machine so in-session tsc checks were silent no-ops. Repaired in 8f1f8c84; build verified green via direct `pnpm --filter intake-frontend build`. All 8 earlier session commits audited — their hook builds genuinely passed.
